headline: Inside India newsletter: Ikea has high hopes for the country as it stares at a global slowdown
summary: Amid slowing global sales and store closures in China, Ikea has high hopes for India.

raw.headline: Inside India newsletter: Ikea has high hopes for the country as it stares at a global slowdown

headline: U.S. Bank Avvance Introduces New Longer-Term Financing Options
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, March 25, 2026--U.S. Bank today announced continued product enhancements for its Avvance point-of-sale lending platform with new longer-term loan options designed for larger home improvement projects.
